author: Amber
body: I had bought this and came to my purchase history to buy a filter replacement. I then saw that they updated the listing to include that there is a cancer and reproductive harm warning for this purifier, and my return window has closed. I would not have purchased this item had this been posted before as I took my time comparing similar items. Do not buy, you will be exposing you or/ and your family to harmful chemicals.

author: Kathryn
body: I've had this in my bedroom for 5 months, and it seems like it helps with my allergies. I like that there is a sleep mode that is very quite (almost can't hear that it is on from 10 feet away). You can also turn off all the light completely on the display for sleeping, which I think is a very important feature.

author: Ngan
title: I received a used item instead of a new one. The screen is heavily scratched, and the filter was dusty. Very disappointed with the condition. I will be returning this product.

author: Wendy
body: I’ve used this for about 5 months now in my one bedroom apartment about 600 square feet. In any room I use it works really well and very soon after turning it on I notice a significance difference in air quality. I struggle with allergies all the time, and this has helped so much. I definitely recommend it.

author: Shelly
title: Best pick according to chat GPT.
body: Chat GPT recommended this air purifier.

author: Buffy P
title: Amazing air purifier
body: This air purifier is incredible. Even after just three hours, I could sense a noticeable improvement in the air quality. I’m already planning to buy another one for the living room as well!

author: William
title: Substitution? Please adjust price.
body: I received the Core 300 and a Core 200, not (2) Core 300's. Please adjust price. Isn't it a little premature to ask for a specific product review right after it's received?

author: MrsRaci
title: Powerful Air Purifier
body: Love this air purifier. Helps with pet dander in master bedroom.
